fact: The nearest accessible restroom to Gate C is on the ground floor, 20 meters past the ticket check.
A restroom is located near Gate A, on the upper concourse level, next to the merchandise stall.
Food stalls near Gate B offer local snacks, pizza, and vegetarian options, open from 2 hours before kickoff.
The North concourse food court has the widest variety, including halal and gluten-free options.
The nearest metro station is a 5 minute walk from the North exit, with trains every 6 minutes on match days.
Free shuttle buses to the main parking lots depart from the South exit every 10 minutes after the match.
Gate A is on the east side of the stadium, accessible from the main plaza, and handles sections 100-120.
Gate C is on the west side of the stadium, accessible from the transit plaza, and handles sections 200-220.
The central medical station is located near Gate C, staffed throughout the event, marked with a red cross sign.
The main information desk is at the central plaza entrance, offering maps and lost-and-found services.
Zone B is currently experiencing high crowd density; visitors are advised to use the North concourse instead.
The North concourse currently has light foot traffic and is the fastest route between Gate A and Gate B.
The West parking lot is reserved for pre-booked vehicles and is a 10 minute walk from Gate A.
Bicycle parking is available near the East entrance as part of the stadium's low-emission transport initiative.
Color-coded recycling bins for plastic, paper, and compost are placed every 50 meters across all concourses.
Free water refill stations are available near every gate to reduce single-use plastic bottle waste.
Multilingual volunteer staff, covering Spanish, French, Arabic, and Portuguese, are stationed at the main plaza info desk.
This concierge assistant can respond in multiple languages based on the language you type your question in.
Gate C currently has an estimated 12 minute entry wait time due to bag checks; Gate A has no significant delay.
All gates are operating standard security screening; no elevated alert status is currently in effect.
